parameters.content:
## ICP Drift Detector

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set ICP_SHEET_ID (sheet with your actual won customer data)
3. Set ICP_DEFINITION env var (your stated ICP: e.g. 'B2B SaaS, 50-200 employees, engineering-led, US/EU')
4. Set ICP_EMAIL_TO
5. No LLM needed — statistical comparison

**Flow:** Reads actual won/retained customers → compares attribute distribution against stated ICP → flags divergence → sends report
